article: A new government policy aims to reduce carbon emissions by 30% over the next decade.
headline_positive: Government Takes Bold Action to Protect the Environment
headline_negative: Government Imposes Restrictive New Rules That Could Hurt Businesses

article: A study found that screen time among teenagers has increased by 20% in the last year.
headline_positive: New Study Shows Teens More Connected Than Ever
headline_negative: Teen Screen Time Skyrockets, Raising Health Concerns
